sentences.target: Ich setze einen Punkt am Satzende.

translations.de: Ich setze einen Punkt am Satzende.
translations.en: I’m putting a period at the end of the sentence.
translations.es: Pongo un punto al final de la frase.
translations.fr: Je mets un point à la fin de la phrase.
translations.it: Metto un punto alla fine della frase.
translations.ru: Я ставлю точку в конце предложения.
translations.pt: Coloco um ponto no final da frase.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt dấu chấm ở cuối câu.
translations.nl: Ik zet een punt aan het einde van de zin.
translations.uk: Я ставлю крапку в кінці речення.
translations.hi: मैं वाक्य के अंत में पूर्णविराम लगा रहा हूँ।
translations.el: Βάζω τελεία στο τέλος της πρότασης.
translations.nb: Jeg setter et punktum på slutten av setningen.
translations.id: Saya menaruh titik di akhir kalimat.
translations.sv: Jag sätter en punkt i slutet av meningen.
translations.ro: Pun un punct la sfârșitul propoziției.
translations.da: Jeg sætter et punktum i slutningen af sætningen.
translations.ja: 文の最後に句点を打ちます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1st sg); main predicate meaning ‘to set/place’. Here: placing a punctuation mark.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Punkt’ marking it as the direct object.
Common noun; direct object. Sense here: punctuation mark (full stop) placed at the end of a sentence.
Preposition ‘an’ contracted with the article ‘dem’ (‘an dem’ → ‘am’); introduces a locative PP and governs the dative.
Compound noun (‘Satz’+‘Ende’), dative singular as object of ‘an’; denotes the location ‘at the end of the sentence’.

sentences.target: Unsere Mannschaft braucht nur einen Punkt.

translations.de: Unsere Mannschaft braucht nur einen Punkt.
translations.en: Our team only needs one point.
translations.es: Nuestro equipo solo necesita un punto.
translations.fr: Notre équipe n'a besoin que d'un point.
translations.it: Alla nostra squadra basta un punto.
translations.ko: 우리 팀은 승점 한 점만 필요해요.
translations.yue: 我哋嘅球隊只需要一分。
translations.ru: Нашей команде нужно всего одно очко.
translations.pt: Nossa equipe só precisa de um ponto.
translations.he: הקבוצה שלנו צריכה רק נקודה אחת.
translations.tr: Takımımızın sadece bir puana ihtiyacı var.
translations.vi: Đội chúng ta chỉ cần một điểm.
translations.ar: فريقنا يحتاج إلى نقطة واحدة فقط.
translations.nl: Ons team heeft maar één punt nodig.
translations.uk: Нашій команді потрібне лише одне очко.
translations.hu: A csapatunknak csak egy pontra van szüksége.
translations.hi: हमारी टीम को सिर्फ एक अंक चाहिए।
translations.pl: Nasza drużyna potrzebuje tylko jednego punktu.
translations.el: Η ομάδα μας χρειάζεται μόνο έναν βαθμό.
translations.nb: Laget vårt trenger bare ett poeng.
translations.id: Tim kami hanya butuh satu poin.
translations.sv: Vårt lag behöver bara en poäng.
translations.ro: Echipa noastră are nevoie doar de un punct.
translations.cs: Náš tým potřebuje jen jeden bod.
translations.da: Vores hold har kun brug for ét point.
translations.ja: うちのチームは勝ち点があと1あればいいです。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, nominative feminine singular; modifies ‘Mannschaft’ (subject).
Common noun; subject of the sentence, feminine singular.
Finite verb (present, 3rd sg); main predicate meaning ‘to need’.
Focus adverb limiting quantity; modifies the NP ‘einen Punkt’ to mean ‘only one’.
Indefinite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Punkt’, marking the direct object.
Common noun; direct object. Sense here: a score point in a competition.

sentences.target: Ich markiere den Punkt auf der Karte.
sentences.reading: /ɪç maʁˈkiːʁə deːn pʊŋkt aʊ̯f deːʁ ˈkaʁtə/

translations.de: Ich markiere den Punkt auf der Karte.
translations.ipa: /ɪç maʁˈkiːʁə deːn pʊŋkt aʊ̯f deːʁ ˈkaʁtə/
translations.en: I’m marking the point on the map.
translations.es: Marco el lugar en el mapa.
translations.fr: Je marque l'emplacement sur la carte.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在地图上标出那个位置。
translations.yue: 我喺地圖上標記嗰個位置。
translations.pt: Estou marcando o local no mapa.
translations.he: אני מסמן את הנקודה על המפה.
translations.vi: Tôi đánh dấu vị trí đó trên bản đồ.
translations.nl: Ik markeer die plek op de kaart.
translations.uk: Я позначаю це місце на карті.
translations.hu: Bejelölöm azt a pontot a térképen.
translations.hi: मैं नक्शे पर उस जगह को चिन्हित कर रहा हूँ।
translations.id: Saya menandai lokasi itu di peta.
translations.ja: 地図にその地点をマークします。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1st sg); main predicate meaning ‘to mark’.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of ‘Punkt’, marking a specific direct object.
Common noun; direct object. Sense here: a specific dot/spot to be marked.
Preposition introducing a locative PP; with dative here to indicate static location (‘on the map’).
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of ‘Karte’ as object of the preposition.
Common noun; complement of the preposition ‘auf’ in dative, indicating the surface where the marking occurs.

translations.en: I’ll get straight to the point.
translations.vi: Tôi sẽ đi thẳng vào vấn đề.
translations.hi: मैं सीधे मुद्दे पर आता हूँ।

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite verb (present, 1st sg); main predicate meaning ‘to come’.
Preposition ‘zu’ contracted with ‘dem’ (‘zu dem’ → ‘zum’); introduces a PP with dative; here used idiomatically.
Common noun; object of ‘zu’ (dative). Idiomatic expression ‘zum Punkt kommen’ = ‘to get to the point’.

jp: Ich setze einen Punkt am Satzende.
Unsere Mannschaft braucht nur einen Punkt.
Ich markiere den Punkt auf der Karte.
fu: /ɪç maʁˈkiːʁə deːn pʊŋkt aʊ̯f deːʁ ˈkaʁtə/
de: Ich setze einen Punkt am Satzende.
Unsere Mannschaft braucht nur einen Punkt.
Ich markiere den Punkt auf der Karte.
ipa: /ɪç maʁˈkiːʁə deːn pʊŋkt aʊ̯f deːʁ ˈkaʁtə/
en: I’m putting a period at the end of the sentence.
Our team only needs one point.
I’m marking the point on the map.
I’ll get straight to the point.
